discrepancy_assessment.observed: No crate source file changed between plan activation and the maintained measurement.
discrepancy_assessment.inference: The variance comes from replacing the read-only prototype classifier with the maintained item-range classifier. The checked-in classifier preserves line positions, ignores braces in comments and strings, and separates test-only files and test-only Rust items.
discrepancy_assessment.decision: Use the maintained measurements as the ratchet baseline and retain the prototype observations for audit provenance.

commands.relevant_result: Eight detector tests passed after the fail-first run proved the new classifier exports were absent.
commands.caveat: The fail-first run exited 1 with the expected missing-export error.

commands.relevant_result: The three independent scopes measured 778 lines across 38 regions, 693 lines across 35 regions, and 2,184 lines across 79 regions.
commands.caveat: Exact-clone measurement does not replace semantic characterization.

commands.relevant_result: URL, credential, webhook, output, and notification behavior passed before refactoring.
Normalization, source parsing, remote inference, scheduler, and scraper lifecycle behavior passed before refactoring.
commands.caveat: Tests requiring live external services remained intentionally ignored.
